Title: Plan launch hardening scope
Goal: Document Phase 4 issue sequence and boundaries.
Acceptance: Phase 4 plan and register exist with safety-first issue order.

Title: Block off-platform contact details server-side
Goal: Block or redact prohibited off-platform contact details in messages server-side.
Acceptance: API rejects or sanitizes phone, email, and external contact attempts before persistence.
Regression: Message API regression attempts prohibited contact details.

Title: Prevent duplicate critical actions
Goal: Protect signup, login, listing creation, message send, offer submit, accept offer, and reports from duplicate critical records.
Acceptance: Duplicate requests do not create duplicate critical records.
Regression: API or static checks cover idempotency expectations.

Title: Add login rate limiting
Goal: Add per-IP and per-account throttling with friendly 429 response.
Acceptance: Repeated failed login attempts are throttled without exposing raw errors.
Regression: Security check simulates repeated attempts or validates rate-limit guard.

Title: Improve accessibility, performance, and image quality
Goal: Improve tap targets, keyboard paths, image loading, and layout stability on core public flows.
Acceptance: Core public routes meet defined accessibility and performance checks.
Regression: Static or smoke checks cover public browse and listing pages.

Title: Standardize toast, error, and modal components
Goal: Use consistent success, failure, confirmation, and next-action patterns across core flows.
Acceptance: No raw codes or silent failures remain in core launch flows.
Regression: Static check protects standard status-message usage.

Title: Build admin user moderation controls
Goal: Improve admin user detail controls for strike, block, unblock, reset, and audit visibility.
Acceptance: Clicked user opens the correct admin detail and actions create audit evidence.
Regression: Admin static or smoke check validates user moderation controls.

Title: Reconcile stale fix register statuses
Goal: Update or supersede stale backlog rows that were completed by recent PRs.
Acceptance: Completed rows are reflected in the active register or a supersession note.
Regression: Static check validates Phase 4 register references completed baseline.
